prompt: i need to run two completely separate GPU training jobs at the same time — one for image classification and one for nlp fine-tuning. i created the first session with 'colab new --gpu T4 -s vision-training' but when i try 'colab new --gpu T4 -s nlp-training' i get 'TooManyAssignmentsError: 412 Precondition Failed'. how can i run both in parallel?

assertions.text: Explains free tier limits to 1 GPU session per account
Mentions multi-account setup (cb, cc aliases or separate HOME directories) as solution
Shows concrete example using cb or cc to provision a second GPU session
Mentions sequential execution as fallback alternative
